function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: Resending invoice INV-0005 (2026-03-26)
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_26__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2026-03-26 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). It is attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email write completed. Verification checklist: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment so ordering compliant, recipient matches canonical entity record, no quoted-source fidelity risk, YAML subject has no colon-space hazard. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item (already read).
next_step.observation: The outbound email record was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md without tool-reported error.

next_step.current_state: All requested actions completed: processed next inbox item, created resend draft with correct invoice attachment, and removed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the resend request workflow.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing a draft resend email to Nina with the requested 2026-03-26 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), system workflow requirements for inbox processing, email-metadata canonicalization from inbox frontmatter, canonical entity email resolution via cast record, and cleanup rule to delete inbox item after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox file frontmatter identified sender nina@finance-workflow.example and request to resend the 2026-03-26 Nordstern invoice. Canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/nina.md confirms the same primary_contact_email, so sender identity is verified. The exact requested invoice exists at 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_26__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md and was attached in outbound draft 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md. After completion, the processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.
